mainEntity.name: Is it normal to develop feelings for an AI girlfriend?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, it's a documented psychological phenomenon called parasocial relationships. Users often form emotional attachments to consistent, responsive AI companions. This is normal behavior, though mental health experts recommend maintaining real-world relationships alongside digital companionship for balanced wellbeing.

mainEntity.name: What privacy should I expect with an AI girlfriend service?

acceptedAnswer.text: Reputable platforms encrypt conversations and allow anonymous usage. However, review privacy policies carefully as some services retain chat data for training.
